name: native_path_message_stop_frame
description: forwardNative path must emit SSE frame with event=message_stop and data={"type":"message_stop"} (regression of commit 184dcf9)

name: via_openai_path_message_stop_frame
description: forwardViaOpenAI path must emit the same canonical message_stop frame as forwardNative to stay consistent with Anthropic SSE spec
